choices.text: Moment = weight × arm. Total moment / total weight = CG. Check vs. POH envelope (allowed CG range vs. weight). Forward CG = stable but hard flare; aft CG = less stable. Out-of-envelope = loss of control.

Density altitude calculation: hot + high + humid = thin air = degraded performance. POH charts show takeoff roll vs. DA + weight + wind. Add 50% safety margin. Consider lighter load + early morning + best climb gradient route.
